title: Monte Cristo
writer: Alexandre Dumas, Bernard McConville, Sandro Salvini

plot: A film adaptation of the classic Alexandre Dumas novel. Edmond Dantes is falsely accused by those jealous of his good fortune, and is sentenced to spend the rest of his life in the notorious island prison, Chateau d'If. While impr...
